title: Loud (Part 2)
speaker: Antwan Cronje
summary: This sermon, part of the LOUD series, explains that the loudest voice in our lives controls us, comparing deceptive voices to "spam calls." Just as spam calls sound real to make us doubt and open the door, the worst "spam calls" are the voices in our minds that target our identity. Our identity is the operating system for our entire life — every decision, every relationship, every risk flows from it. The enemy doesn't need to wreck your life; he just needs to lie about who you are.
quotes: Whatever voice is speaking the loudest in your life right now is the one that's running the show.
The enemy does not need to wreck your life. He just needs to lie about who you are.
The enemy does not need to shout. He just needs you to doubt.
